description: You are a Data Analyst working with the Chinook digital media store database. Management needs a continuous daily revenue report for the entire year of 2012 (a leap year) to drive a dashboard line chart. Using the Chinook SQLite database at '/home/ga/Documents/databases/chinook.db', generate a report for all 366 days in 2012 (Jan 1 to Dec 31) joined with daily invoice totals. The output must include three columns: 'SalesDate' (YYYY-MM-DD), 'DailyTotal' (revenue for that day, filling 0.00 for days with no sales), and 'IsWeekend' ('Yes' for Saturday/Sunday, 'No' for others). Export the results to '/home/ga/Documents/exports/daily_revenue_2012.csv' and save the SQL script to '/home/ga/Documents/scripts/date_gap_analysis.sql'.
